name: Bisquick Fudge Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large saucepan over low heat, melt 1 cup of chocolate chips with the margarine. Remove from heat.
3. Add the biscuit mix, sweetened condensed milk, egg, and vanilla to the melted chocolate mixture. Stir in the remaining chocolate chips.
4. Pour the batter into a well-greased 13x9-inch pan.
5. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until the brownies begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
6. Turn off the oven and let the brownies cool.
7. Garnish as desired.
8. Cut into bars.
